name: cisco-shodan-sie-tool
summary:
cisco-shodan-sie-tool
leverages shodan to exploit the cisco smart install exploit

documentation.readme: cisco-shodan-sie-tool leverages shodan to exploit the cisco smart install exploit

arguments.description: Path to a wordlist (users, passwords, paths).

arguments.description: Print what would be done without making any changes.

arguments.name: --force
arguments.description: Force the action even if a safety check would block it.

chain_examples.note: Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with xransum/phantex (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with smoorthi_uno/Shodan_Python_Project (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with sergioamsilva/wifi-security-toolkit (score=10); pair in the chain planner.

Phase 3: same attack_surface=['web', 'cloud', 'iots'] and phase_hint='recon'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

Phase 4: same attack_surface=['web', 'cloud', 'iots'] and phase_hint='recon'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

Phase 5: same attack_surface=['web', 'cloud', 'iots'] and phase_hint='recon'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

documentation.when_to_use:
Use during the 'recon' phase against surfaces [web, cloud, iots] in the Reconnaissance category. Fits when the engagement needs: cisco-shodan-sie-tool
leverages shodan to exploit the cisco smart install exploit.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: cisco-shodan-sie-tool leverages shodan to exploit the cisco smart install exploit.
documentation.how_to_use: Clone or install `cisco-shodan-sie-tool` from its upstream repository, then run `cisco-shodan-sie-tool --help` (or the README entrypoint) to confirm flags. cisco-shodan-sie-tool leverages shodan to exploit the cisco smart install exploit.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases and licence before use.

use_cases:
When you need Reconnaissance, use cisco-shodan-sie-tool because cisco-shodan-sie-tool
leverages shodan to exploit the cisco smart install exploit.
When the engagement is in the recon phase, use cisco-shodan-sie-tool as a cataloged Reconnaissance tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Reconnaissance tools, pair cisco-shodan-sie-tool with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `cisco-shodan-sie-tool --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
